You want the work done if you turn to 14 What's most important here is you want the work done to the greatest degree possible before you arrive right so that They are if you view them on a continuum of 1 to 10 This way and one is don't know guy from Adam Think he may have answered to my problem might want to use him to 10 Absolutely determined to get him if it is all possible to get him we desperately need him and only need him you damn sure want him past the five And by the way, it's not just about getting the sale It's about everything that's going to happen after you get the sale because if you got the sale by selling Keeping control of them after the sale is going to be very difficult If you got the sale by them selling you Then keeping control of them after the fact is going to be a lot easier. So this is not just about Getting somebody into a coaching program. This is not just about getting somebody into a consulting contract This is about what will color the relationship forever How it starts has a lot to do with how it's going to go and how it's going to end Okay, and the worst thing you can do is be an impatient Instinctive sales person which we all are and want to jump on it too quick and sell it too hard Especially if you're good at it. So, you know, I can get a check out of a rock in a pay toilet So the my instinctive reaction is As soon as somebody who might have a check in their pocket rears their head I mean, I know how to knock them down and get the check in five minutes But that doesn't mean that the relationship is going to be good After I get it. So I have to restrain my impulses and Implement a process that gives me control over the client not just the check From the client too many people care just about making the sale not about what's going to happen after the sale You can make you can sell them by brute force You can put them in coaching by brute force. You can get a consulting client by brute force You can't keep them around for ten years if you got them by brute force That's what's important to know. Yes I'm wondering what you did in the meeting with the CEO that convinced him that you needed to write a letter in his voice and do this whole process to bring you back For a paid meeting with the group I well the short answer is I told him Okay, and so let me embellish the short answer first and then I'll give you a blow-by-bowl long answer the short answer is important because My Positioning from word go is there there to be told what to do And I tell them what to do and they do it so It's not like Gee here's here's something that would be good to do will you do it? It's here's what we're going to do Right, and it would be better if I wrote it then you write it because I'm better at that than you are So I'll write it if there's something in it. You don't like we can talk about it Okay, so all of it is about I'm gonna tell you what to do and The real important thing to keep in mind about all that is for the most part again. That's really what everybody wants They want certainty they want somebody to tell them what to do and it doesn't much matter Whether they're making ten million dollars a year or ten cents a year doesn't much make any difference They're looking for somebody to tell them what to do The longer answer to your question is They're the ones who needed the group meeting So we had a full day so my normal procedure is the intake procedure I talked about Ultimately every new relationship begins with a paid day of consulting and then at the end of the day Maybe something happens. Maybe it doesn't right So they pay for the day of consulting and in this case they paid a premium because they had they wanted to be wedged in at a time I didn't want to wedge them in and I forced them to come to where I was going to be on vacation anyway Except so I inconvenienced them and all of that Okay, I did it a because I was going to be I only did it's all I had and B because in convincing them is a good thing to do Like the worst thing to do is go to their office That's like the worst thing to do So so now we have the day so my normal reaction now at the end of the day is Okay, we get it. Will you do this for us and how much does it cost for you to do this, right?
